title: cohniella lacera
intro: Cohniella lacera, also known as 'Cut-leaved Geranium', is a type of flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cohniella lacera is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in topical creams and ointments to promote healing and skin health.
